title: Mattermost RCE
summary: [P1] Mattermost versions 10.11.x <= 10.11.12 are vulnerable to remote code execution due to a missing authorization flaw, with no patch available. Exploitation in the wild has not been reported yet. Why now: Newly disclosed vulnerability with potential for widespread exploitation. (confidence: 0.80)
